title: Implement Module Resolution & Caching
description: Explain the Node.js module resolution algorithm for `require` and `import` statements. Optimize module loading performance by understanding and leveraging module caching mechanisms. Implement strategies to manage singleton lifecycles across the application through module caching.
objectives: Explain the Node.js module resolution algorithm for `require` and `import` statements.
Optimize module loading performance by understanding and leveraging module caching mechanisms.
Implement strategies to manage singleton lifecycles across the application through module caching.
